title: Treecapitator (Heavy Axe)
description: This mod adds a Heavy Axe ( TreeCapitator ) that chops down entire trees
body: Heavy Axe is a useful utility mod for Minecraft 1.12.2, 1.14, 1.16.5 designed to make woodcutting much faster and more effecient. No more wasting time breaking every single log block by hand. This mod add heavy axe that have TreeCapitator mechanic with balance recept
